title: TMT: system tests consistently failing on fedora-eln-x86_64
body:
The registry container refuses to start on fedora-eln-x86_64 TMT jobs.

```
# $ podman --cgroup-manager=cgroupfs run -d --name reg -v /tmp/skopeo_bats.j5Tc7n/auth:/auth:Z -p 5000:5000 -e REGISTRY_STORAGE_DELETE_ENABLED=true quay.io/libpod/registry:2.8.2
# b61a5dd94f1328a6dca37fc9afc9e2a716a63264bff71a498bb14155fe27853c
# /var/ARTIFACTS/work-planspb7o7fpp/plans/discover/default-0/tests/systemtest/helpers.bash: connect: Connection refused
# /var/ARTIFACTS/work-planspb7o7fpp/plans/discover/default-0/tests/systemtest/helpers.bash: line 359: /dev/tcp/127.0.0.1/5000: Connection refused
# /var/ARTIFACTS/work-planspb7o7fpp/plans/discover/default-0/tests/systemtest/helpers.bash: connect: Connection refused
# /var/ARTIFACTS/work-planspb7o7fpp/plans/discover/default-0/tests/systemtest/helpers.bash: line 359: /dev/tcp/127.0.0.1/5000: Connection refused
# /var/ARTIFACTS/work-planspb7o7fpp/plans/discover/default-0/tests/systemtest/helpers.bash: connect: Connection refused
# /var/ARTIFACTS/work-planspb7o7fpp/plans/discover/default-0/tests/systemtest/helpers.bash: line 359: /dev/tcp/127.0.0.1/5000: Connection refused
# /var/ARTIFACTS/work-planspb7o7fpp/plans/discover/default-0/tests/systemtest/helpers.bash: connect: Connection refused
```

Seen on 
#2747 direct link: https://artifacts.dev.testing-farm.io/fa45302b-daf8-409c-a3c8-9db99c54e90b/
#2746 direct link: https://artifacts.dev.testing-farm.io/87839581-c9bb-4710-91cf-ef271c722d73/

comments.body: A friendly reminder that this issue had no activity for 30 days.
